title: Repository to watch
description: Configure one GitHub repository for read-only workflow and activity checks. Use Owner for the GitHub user or organization, and Repository for the repository name only.

fields.label: GitHub OAuth client ID
fields.help: Optional for local development. Official Status builds ship the public GitHub OAuth client ID; use this field only to override it with your own OAuth App client ID.

fields.label: Owner
fields.help: GitHub user or organization, for example statusfoundry.

fields.label: Repository
fields.help: Repository name only, for example status. Do not paste the full GitHub URL.
